he09e6b9ag28a6g4c48ga9f4g7c4a70f38aed: *Fungus and mold glaze the grotesque creature's face and body.*
ha0794804gdfbbg4206g8bf0g9f927f364112: *A voice drifts into your mind as you gaze upon the misshapen servant.*
ha72f7a0ag67c5g4db3gbb78g9172310c0de1: ((*Leave this one. Come to me. We must speak.*))
